title: BetterStaff
description: A plugin showing staff online and their names
body:
**BetterStaff: Enhance Staff Management & Visibility**

BetterStaff transforms how players identify and interact with your server's moderation team. This lightweight yet powerful plugin visually distinguishes staff members in the tab list with customizable rank prefixes, creating a professional server appearance while making it easy for players to find help when needed.

**Key Features:**

**📋 Visual Staff Display**

Customizable colored prefixes for each staff rank in the tab list

Clear visibility of which staff members are currently online

Professional team organization that showcases your server's structure

**🛡️ Permission-Based Rank System**

Define custom ranks (Owner, Admin, Moderator, Helper, etc.)

Easily add staff members to specific ranks via configuration

Permissions integration for role-based access control

**💬 Staff Status Commands**

/betterstaff - See a list of online staff members with their ranks

/betterstaff reload - Instantly apply configuration changes

**🔔 Staff Activity Notifications**

Optional alerts when staff members join or leave the server

Keep your team informed about moderation coverage

**⚙️ Extensive Configuration**

Customize all messages and notifications

Personalize rank names, colors, and prefixes

Fine-tune tab list behavior to match your server's aesthetic

This plugin stands out through its simplicity and effectiveness. While other plugins may offer similar functionality buried within complex feature sets, our focused approach ensures maximum performance with minimal resource usage. The intuitive configuration allows you to have your staff team displayed professionally within minutes of installation.


Whether you run a small community server or a large network, BetterStaff enhances player experience by making support easily accessible while giving your moderation team the recognition they deserve. Compatible with all major server versions and ready to use right out of the box!
